author: Philip S.

title: Intriguing Gizmo
comment:
It does have a cool factor to it. It is thinner than a credit card, so I wouldn't carry it in a wallet for fear I'd damage it. My butt would push the on button and then the battery would drain, so it stays in the desk drawer.

I do admire the wireless connectivity. No fishing around for the right cable.
Easily configured; I chose the seed words instead of the seed numbers for setting up the wallet.

The phone app has a way to go, needs polishing. It's minimalist functions do work. Needs a spell check. In the Host Devices, instead of Swipe to delete

The bitcoin logo is big and bold. They'll see me coming and know I'm a bitcoin fan without even having to put on their glasses.

title: First Time Shopper is pleased

title: Makes me feel my BitCoins are secure

title: Yummy soap
comment:
It takes me a while to decide if I like a soap, using is several times to see if it's a good fit.
The soap has a good balance. It will cut the built-up skin oil, but is mild and doesn't dry out your skin causing roughness. After washing my face with it, my skin feels refreshed, creamy and smooth.
I expected some kind of scent, but no. It is absolutely neutral in smell.

title: I bought my Trezor Hardware Wallet. This is GrRRAT!!!
comment: I bought my Trezor Hardware Wallet. This is GrRRAT!!! Best price on the net from an authorized dealer. You can't find it cheaper on ebay, or from the original Trezor store. Bitcoin store is the best. They are authorized dealer so you get the warranty as if you bought it directly from the manufacture. Also, their shipping time is faster because they have drop-ship location in the USA. It took 3 days from order to arrival. NICE. I love my Trezor.

author: jerry h.

title: Great product and experience
comment: The Trezor wallet is a great product, easy to setup and use. My purchase experience was also very good, and I received my Trezor in 7 days. Their communication was good as well. The only improvement I can suggest would be to include an approximate ship date on the order confirmation. For in stock items I would think that this would be fairly easy to do, and is pretty much expected with online orders nowadays. All in all though, I am very happy.
author: Robert Y.

title: Great!
comment: I searched around and found the best pricing from this site. At first I was a little sceptical because price was too good to be true and I saw the domain name of the store was different but decided to take a chance and 2 weeks later I had my trezor. It came sealed. I searched around for outside reviews and could not find any. I Googled to see if site was a scam but couldn't really find concrete evidence. Anyways U have to rip the box open. I set it up by going to the trezor website and following their directions. Pretty easy. I also watched a few YouTube videos. Great price and easy setup. Took a little longer than I expected to recieve shipment due to demand but we'll worth it.

comment:
That item is amazing because: 
1.The quality is REALY good
2.the sellers are VERY responsive (we had trouble sending the item but the seller was very positive and was very responsive and we solved the problems)

the item is totally worth the price
and its a great gift for a dogecoin enthusiast.

Tamir
author: Tamir

title: Don't hesitate...buy it from these fine folks!!!
comment: The Trezor cannot be beat for purpose, ease of use, simplicity, and security...security...security!!!!! Bought from The Bitcoin Store and would not consider buying all things Crypto from any other source. I had occasion to use their customer service and found it to be personal, knowledgeable, and VERY, VERY patient. Actually, I think the owner was the person who answered my questions and in general, put up with my dumb ***. THANK YOU, STEPHEN !!!!! And, thank you, Satoshi, for a very elegant and user friendly product.
